 ---
 title: "HawkingRFBOs"
author: "Abigail Schiffmiller"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: html_document
---

  
```{r libraries}
library(readr)
library(lubridate)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggh4x)
library(stringr)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
```
 
 
# Prey Capture Attempts  

```{r}
load(file.choose()) # "fullPCAdf.Rdata"

# remove scavenging and theft
fullPCAdf <- fullPCAdf[-(c(16,22,169,218,308, 317,318,426)),] #8
# remove mislabeled Aborted-NAs
fullPCAdf <- fullPCAdf[-(which(fullPCAdf$PCA == "Aborted" & is.na(fullPCAdf$pcaSub))),]

```


##Prey Capture Attempts barplot

```{r}


# Summarize counts 2022
PCAdf22 <- fullPCAdf[(fullPCAdf$year == "2022"),]
PCAdf22 <- PCAdf22[(PCAdf22$PCA != "Aborted"),]
pca_summary <- PCAdf22 %>%
   count(PCA, pcaSub, success)

# Ensure factor levels
 pca_summary$pcaSub <- factor(pca_summary$pcaSub,
                              levels = c("Type 1","Type 2","plunge Dive","Hawking",
                                         "Shallow angle","Dip-dive","Other"))
 pca_summary$success <- factor(pca_summary$success,
                         levels = c("successful","unknown","failed","aborted"))
 pca_summary$PCA <- factor(pca_summary$PCA,
                     levels = c("Plunge Dive","Hawking","Other","Aborted"))

### Define colors and alpha ####

PCAdf22$pCAxSuccess <- interaction(PCAdf22$PCA,PCAdf22$success)

fill_col_alpha <- c("Plunge Dive.successful"="#51127cff", "Hawking.successful"="#b63679ff", "Other.successful"="#fb8861ff","Aborted.successful"="#fcfdbf33",    
                    "Plunge Dive.unknown"="#51127ca3", "Hawking.unknown" ="#b63679a3", "Other.unknown"="#fb8861a3","Aborted.unknown"="#fcfdbf33",       
                    "Plunge Dive.failed" ="#51127c47", "Hawking.failed" ="#b6367947", "Other.failed"="#fb886147","Aborted.failed"="#fcfdbf33",        
                    "Plunge Dive.aborted" ="#51127c33", "Hawking.aborted" ="#b6367933", "Other.aborted"="#fb886133","Aborted.aborted"="#fcfdbf33")  


## Barplot ####
PCAxsuccess.stackedbarplot <- ggplot(data=PCAdf22, aes(fill=pCAxSuccess, x=PCA))+
   geom_bar(position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE), color="white" )+
   scale_fill_manual(values = fill_col_alpha)+
   #scale_alpha_manual(values= alpha_values)+
   geom_label(
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      data = PCAdf22,
      stat = "count",
      mapping = aes(x = PCA, label = after_stat(count), group = pCAxSuccess),
      position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5, reverse = TRUE),
      color = "black",
      fill = alpha("white", 0.4),
      border.color = rgb(1, 1, 1, alpha = 0),   # outline color
      label.padding = unit(0.1, "lines"),
      size = 6
   ) +
   xlab("Prey Capture Attempt Type")+
   coord_flip()+
   # theme 
   theme_bw()+
   theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_blank(),
      # axis and title font sizes
      axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 15)),  # space above x title
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),  # space right of y title
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, color="black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, color="black",margin = margin(r = -20)),
      
      legend.position="none")
   
PCAxsuccess.stackedbarplot
  

         
  #### counts legend 3x3 ####
         df_legendc <- PCAdf22 %>%
            count(PCA, success) %>%
            mutate(
               pCAxSuccess = interaction(PCA, success, sep = " × "),
               fill_color = fill_col_alpha[as.numeric(pCAxSuccess)]
            )


      
      # --- Add row and column sums ---
      row_sums <- df_legendc %>%
         group_by(PCA) %>%
         summarise(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
         mutate(success = "Row Sum", fill_color = "white")
      
      col_sums <- df_legendc %>%
         group_by(success) %>%
         summarise(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
         mutate(PCA = "Column Sum", fill_color = "white")
      
      # --- Combine ---
      df_legendc_sum <- bind_rows(df_legendc, row_sums, col_sums)
      
      # Explicit row order (top → bottom)
      df_legendc_sum$PCA <- factor(
         df_legendc_sum$PCA,
         levels = c("Other", "Hawking", "Plunge Dive", "Column Sum")
      )
      y_levels <- c("Other", "Hawking", "Plunge Dive", "Column Sum")
      
      # Explicit column order (left → right, totals last)
      df_legendc_sum$success <- factor(
         df_legendc_sum$success,
         levels = c(levels(factor(df_legendc$success)), "Row Sum")
      )
      
      #### Plot ####
      p_legendc <- ggplot(df_legendc_sum, aes(y = PCA, x = success, fill = fill_color)) +
         geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 2) +
         
         # Column Sum labels (top of tile)
         geom_text(
            data = subset(df_legendc_sum, PCA == "Column Sum"),
            aes(label = n),
            size = 5,
            nudge_y = 0.3,   # move label up
            hjust = 0.5      # centered horizontally
         ) +
         
         # Row Sum labels (left of tile)
         geom_text(
            data = subset(df_legendc_sum, success == "Row Sum"),
            aes(label = n),
            size = 5,
            nudge_x = -0.4,  # move label left
            vjust = 0.5      # centered vertically
         ) +
         
         scale_fill_identity() +
         scale_x_discrete(
            position = "top",
            labels = function(x) ifelse(x == "Row Sum", "", x)
         ) +
         scale_y_discrete(
            limits = rev(y_levels),  # <<— reverse order so Column Sum at bottom
            labels = function(y) ifelse(y == "Column Sum", "", y)
         ) +
         
         theme_minimal() +
         theme(
            axis.title = element_blank(),
            panel.grid = element_blank(),
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = .5, size = 14, color = "black"),
            axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 14, color = "black"),
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
         )
      
      p_legendc


final_plot <- PCAxsuccess.stackedbarplot +
   inset_element(
      p_legendc,
      left = 0.5,   # x start (0 = left, 1 = right)
      bottom = 0.45, # y start (0 = bottom, 1 = top)
      right = 1,  # x end
      top = 0.9     # y end
   )

final_plot


```



## Prey Capture Attempts V hawking proportion V footage minutes

```{r}


PCAprop2 <- fullPCAdf[,c(1,4:6)]
PCAprop2 <- PCAprop2 %>%  
   group_by(ID) %>% 
   summarise(t3 = sum(PCA == "Hawking", na.rm = TRUE), 
             plunge = sum(PCA == "Plunge Dive", na.rm = TRUE),
             other = sum(PCA == "Other", na.rm = TRUE))
PCAprop2$prop <- PCAprop2$t3/(PCAprop2$t3 + PCAprop2$plunge + PCAprop2$other)
PCAprop2 <- PCAprop2[c(1:23,25,26,24),]

## footage 

footage <- fullPCAdf[,c(1:3,12,13)]
footage <- footage[which(complete.cases(footage)==TRUE),]

footage <- footage %>%  
   group_by(ID) %>% 
   mutate(total_t = sum(t_unobscured)) # sum time fro all movies for each bird
footage <- footage[,c(1,4:6)] # remove movi and minutes columns
footage <- as.data.frame(footage)
footage <- unique(footage)



## scatterplot df

birdPCA2 <- data.frame(ID=PCAprop2$ID, t3=PCAprop2$t3, plunge=PCAprop2$plunge, 
                       prop=PCAprop2$prop, PCAnum= (PCAprop2$t3 + PCAprop2$plunge + PCAprop2$other),
                       minutes=footage$total_t, year=footage$year, trip=footage$trip)


       # "jitter" overlapping points for birds 12 and 36:
      birdPCA2$minutes[3] <- 89 # bird12 - round up from 86.87
      birdPCA2$minutes[16] <- 76 # bird36 - round down from 77.2
      
      birdPCA2$PCAnum[3] <- 21.925 # bird12 - round down from 22
      birdPCA2$PCAnum[16] <- 22.075 # bird36 - round up from 22
      
      birdPCA2$prop[3] <- 0.182222 # bird12 - round up from 0.18181818
      birdPCA2$prop[16] <- 0.179999 # bird36 - round down from 0.18181818
      
       # "jitter" overlapping points for birds 5 and 43:
      birdPCA2$PCAnum[2] <- 13.875 # bird5 - round down from 14
      birdPCA2$PCAnum[19] <- 14.075 # bird43 - round up from 14
      
      birdPCA2$prop[2] <- 0.0711111 # bird5 - round up from 0.07142857
      birdPCA2$prop[19] <- 0.0717777 # bird43 - round down from 0.07142857
      
      


## 123o plot scatter ####

plot_hawkV123oVminVtrip <- ggplot(birdPCA2, aes(x=PCAnum, y=prop))+
   # trip marker each bubble ***
   geom_point(aes(shape=trip ), alpha = .8,  # ,size = minutes), alpha = .7)+
              size = 2 ## for non minute scaled center points
              )+ 
   scale_shape_manual(
      name = "Trip",
      values = c(17,19,15,5), # c(10, NA, 13, 8),  #  distinct overlay shapes 
      labels = c(
         "Palmyra Atoll - May 2022",
         "Palmyra Atoll - Nov 2022",
         "Palmyra Atoll - Nov 2024",
         "Chagos Archipelago - Jan 2024*"
      )) +
   # main bubbles: fill & size by minutes
   geom_point(aes( size = minutes, fill= minutes),
              alpha = .4, shape=21)+
   # bubble size scale (minutes)
   scale_size_continuous(name="Minutes of footage", 
                         range=c(1,18),
                         breaks= c(15,30,60,90,120,180), 
                         limits = c(1, max(birdPCA2$minutes)))+    #scales::breaks_extended(n=8))+
   
   # bubble fill scale (minutes)
   scale_fill_continuous(name="Minutes of footage",
                         type="viridis", option="inferno",
                         direction = 1,
                         breaks= c(15,30,60,90,120,180), 
                         limits = c(1, max(birdPCA2$minutes)))+
   #  axes 
   xlab("Number of Attacks")+
   ylab("Proportion of Hawking Attacks")+
   
   # legends
   guides(
      fill = guide_legend(
         title = "Minutes of footage",
         override.aes = list(
            alpha = .4,          # no grey transparency
            color = "black",    # black border
            shape = 21          # circle shape
         )
      ),
      shape = guide_legend(
         title = "Trip", order=1,
         override.aes = list(size = 2, alpha = 1)  #  c(5,0.5,5,5), alpha = 1)  # larger trip symbols
      )
   ) +
   
   # theme 
   theme_bw()+
   theme(
      legend.position= c(.78,.7),  
      legend.box = "vertical",
      legend.box.just = "center",  # left-align the whole legend box
      legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      legend.box.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 8, b = 1, l = 1),  # push second legend right
      
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      
      # axis and title font sizes
      axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),  # space above x title
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),  # space right of y title
      axis.text = element_text(size = 14, color="black"),
      
      # legend font sizes
      legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
      
      # make trip legend points larger
      legend.key.size = unit(1.4, "lines")
   )

plot_hawkV123oVminVtrip



```



  
## Prey capture attempt counts 

```{r}

# GETTING COUNTS of PCAs ####


# of individuals
 (length(unique(fullPCAdf$ID))) -1 #remove seychelles data

# Hours un-obscured footage
hrs_unobs <- ((sum(fullPCAdf$t_unobscured[is.na(fullPCAdf$t_unobscured)== FALSE]))-145)/60 # -145 for seychelles data
hrs_unobs + 13.12543 # + hours of un-obscured footage from videos without any foraging
  
# total PCAs, successfull, unknown, and failed
fullPCAdf %>%
   filter(PCA != "Aborted" & trip != "SeychellesJan24") %>%
   nrow()

# total aborted PCAs
fullPCAdf %>%
   filter(PCA == "Aborted" & trip != "SeychellesJan24") %>%
   nrow()


   ##  PCA percents ####

### 2022       #### 

PCAdf22 <-  fullPCAdf[which(fullPCAdf$year == "2022"),] # to not include 2024 and seychelles
   
   
   # number and percent of each PCA type
      df_PCApercent <- PCAdf22 %>%
      count(PCA) %>%
      group_by(PCA)
     # View(df_PCApercent)
      
      non_aborted2022 <- sum(df_PCApercent$n[1:3])
      total2022 <- sum(df_PCApercent$n)
      
      df_PCApercent <- df_PCApercent %>% 
         mutate( percenttotal = 100 * n/non_aborted2022)
     # View(df_PCApercent)
      

   # number and % of each pCAxSuccess combo
   df_PCAxsuccesspercent <- PCAdf22 %>%
      count(PCA, success) %>%
      group_by(PCA) %>%
      mutate(
         percentsuccess = 100 * n / sum(n),  # percent within each PCA
         pCAxSuccess = interaction(PCA, success, sep = " × ")
      ) %>%
      ungroup() 
   #View(df_PCAxsuccesspercent)

   
   # number and % of each pCAxsubtype
   df_PCAxsub <- PCAdf22 %>%
      count(PCA, pcaSub) %>%
      group_by(PCA) %>%
      mutate(
         percentsub = 100 * n / sum(n),  # percent within each PCA
         pCAxsub = interaction(PCA, pcaSub, sep = " × ")
      ) %>%
      ungroup() 
   #View(df_PCAxsub) 
   
  
      
   # hawking - # of birds, fishstorm, etc
   
    # avg attacks/bird 2022&2024
   
       mean(birdPCA2$PCAnum[c(1:25)])
   #[1] 14.28
       sd(birdPCA2$PCAnum[c(1:25)])
   #[1] 10.08103
       mean(birdPCA2$minutes[c(1:25)])
   #[1] 56.5082
       sd(birdPCA2$minutes[c(1:25)])
   #[1] 30.30438
       
# hawking attacks/bird  %
      mean((birdPCA2$t3[c(1:25)]/birdPCA2$PCAnum[c(1:25)])*(100))
            # [1] 19.53606
   
   
   # other types number and %
   
       nrow(PCAdf22[which(PCAdf22$PCA == "Other"),])
   #[1] 47
       nrow(PCAdf22[which(PCAdf22$PCA == "Other" & PCAdf22$pcaSub == "Dip-dive"),])
   #[1] 16
       nrow(PCAdf22[which(PCAdf22$PCA == "Other" & PCAdf22$pcaSub == "Shallow angle"),])
   #[1] 26
            # > 26/47
                  # [1] 0.5531915
            # > 16/47
                  # [1] 0.3404255
            # > (26+16)/47
                  # [1] 0.893617
            # > 1-((26+16)/47)
                  # [1] 0.106383
            # > 
   
   
   
   ### 2024       #### 
   
   fullPCA2024 <-  fullPCAdf[which(fullPCAdf$year == 2024),]
   fullPCA2024 <-  fullPCA2024[which(fullPCA2024$trip != "SeychellesJan24"),]
   
   # number and percent of each PCA type
   View(df_PCApercent24 <- fullPCA2024 %>%
      count(PCA) %>%
      group_by(PCA))
   
   
   
  (non_aborted2024 <- sum(df_PCApercent24$n[1:2]))
   (total2024 <- sum(df_PCApercent24$n))
   
   (df_PCApercent24 <- df_PCApercent24 %>% 
      mutate( percenttotal = 100 * n/non_aborted2024))
   
   
   # number and % of each pCAxSuccess
   View(df_PCAxsuccesspercent24 <- fullPCA2024 %>%
      count(PCA, success) %>%
      group_by(PCA) %>%
      mutate(
         percentsuccess = 100 * n / sum(n),  # percent within each PCA
         pCAxSuccess = interaction(PCA, success, sep = " × ")
      ) %>%
      ungroup() )
   
   
   # number and % of each pCAxsubtype
   View(df_PCAxsub24 <- fullPCA2024 %>%
      count(PCA, pcaSub) %>%
      group_by(PCA) %>%
      mutate(
         percentsub = 100 * n / sum(n),  # percent within each PCA
         pCAxsub = interaction(PCA, pcaSub, sep = " × ")
      ) %>%
      ungroup() )
   
   
   ## other birds counts! ####
   
   others_full <- fullPCAdf[,c(1,2,8:13)] 
   others_full <- others_full[which(others_full$OB_type_time != ""),]
   
   
            # now need to separate first digit of OB_type_time into a column by itself!!
   
   others_full <- separate(others_full,OB_type_time, into = c("OB_type", "OB_time"), sep = "@")

   length(others_full$OB_time)
   
   OB_hawk <- others_full[which(others_full$OB_type == 3), ]
   View(OB_hawk)
   View(OB_hawk[which(OB_hawk$OB_success == "s"),])                       
   
                      
                   
```

## plotting accelerometry for N28m2

```{r}


# N28m2 ####

N28m2_vid_start <-("2022-11-16 22:26:59.867")  # start time of N28_M2.avi

load(file.choose()) # "nest_28_axy.Rdata"

# subset all accelerometry data for N28 down to the 30 minutes of video 2
N28m2_axy <- N28_axy %>% dplyr::filter(timestamp > ymd_hms(N28m2_vid_start) & timestamp < (ymd_hms(N28m2_vid_start) + minutes(30)))

## run AxyCalcs to get static, dynamic and ODBA
N28m2_axycalcs <- AxyCalcs(N28m2_axy, accX=accX, accY=accY, accZ=accZ, Hz=25, window_S = 2)


# convert to longform
         N28m2ABlong <-  N28m2_axycalcs %>%    
            pivot_longer(
               cols = c(S_x, S_y, S_z, D_x, D_y, D_z),
               names_to = c("type", "axis"),
               names_sep = "_",
               values_to = "value")

## plot axy  - facet grid ####
# Axy_plot_theme ####

Axy_plot_theme <- theme_bw(base_size = 24) +
   theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
   )

### Specify y axis for facets ####

XYZaxes_facet <- facetted_pos_scales(
   y = list(
      axis == "x" ~ scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-1.5, 6.5)), # breaks = seq(-5, 5, 2.5)
      axis == "y" ~ scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-4, 3)), #breaks = seq(-10, 10, 5)
      axis == "z" ~ scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-5, 2)) # breaks = seq(-2, 2, 1)
   ))

## 30s PCAaxyz ####


    
      
N28m2_hawkex <- N28m2ABlong %>% dplyr::filter(timestamp > ymd_hms("2022-11-16 22:49:05") & timestamp < (ymd_hms("2022-11-16 22:49:05") + seconds(30)))# Example of Hawking 


N28m2_hawkex_facet <- ggplot(N28m2_hawkex,aes(x = timestamp, y = value, color = axis,alpha = type)) +
   geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
   facet_grid(axis ~ ., scales = "free_y") +
   
   scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
         x = "darkorchid3", y = "darkcyan",z = "darkorange")) +
   
   scale_alpha_manual(values = c(S = 1, D = 0.5)) +
   
   scale_x_datetime(
      date_breaks = "10 sec",
      #date_minor_breaks = ".25 sec",
      date_labels = "%H:%M:%S") +
   
   labs(
      y = "Acceleration (G)",
      x = "Timestamp (UTC)"
   )+
   Axy_plot_theme + theme(legend.position = "none")

   
#N28m2_hawkex_facet + XYZaxes_facet

##

N28m2_diveex1 <- N28m2ABlong %>% dplyr::filter(timestamp > ymd_hms("2022-11-16 22:50:51") & timestamp < (ymd_hms("2022-11-16 22:50:51") + seconds(30)))# example of plunge dive 

N28m2_diveex_facet <- ggplot(N28m2_diveex1,aes(x = timestamp, y = value, color = axis,alpha = type)) +
   geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
   facet_grid(axis ~ ., scales = "free_y") +
   
   scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
         x = "darkorchid3", y = "darkcyan",z = "darkorange")) +
   
   scale_alpha_manual(values = c(S = 1, D = 0.5)) +
   
   scale_x_datetime(
      date_breaks = "10 sec",
      date_minor_breaks = "1 sec",
      date_labels = "%H:%M:%S") +
   
   labs(
      y = "Acceleration (G)",
      x = "Timestamp (UTC)"
   )+
   
   Axy_plot_theme + theme(legend.position = "none")

#N28m2_diveex_facet + XYZaxes_facet

##

N28m2_flyex1 <- N28m2ABlong %>% dplyr::filter(timestamp > ymd_hms("2022-11-16 22:39:55") & timestamp < (ymd_hms("2022-11-16 22:39:55") + seconds(30)))# example of flying 

N28m2_flyex_facet <- ggplot(N28m2_flyex1,aes(x = timestamp, y = value, color = axis,alpha = type)) +
   geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
   facet_grid(axis ~ ., scales = "free_y") +
   
   scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
         x = "darkorchid3", y = "darkcyan",z = "darkorange")) +
   
   scale_alpha_manual(values = c(S = 1, D = 0.5)) +
   
   scale_x_datetime(
      date_breaks = "10 sec",
      date_minor_breaks = "1 sec",
      date_labels = "%H:%M:%S") +
   
   labs(
      y = "Acceleration (G)",
      x = "Timestamp (UTC)"
   )+
   
   Axy_plot_theme + theme(legend.position = "none")

#N28m2_flyex_facet + XYZaxes_facet




(N28m2_flyex_facet + XYZaxes_facet)  + (N28m2_hawkex_facet + XYZaxes_facet) + (N28m2_diveex_facet + XYZaxes_facet)



```
